Author: kk-triplesix
Name: FarmingBestie
Description:
Mount and minion farming tracker with drop sources.

- Browse all mounts and minions with collection status
- See exact drop sources: trials, raids, dungeons, FATEs, achievements, quests
- Track farming runs with kill counter per duty
- Wishlist system for targeted farming
- Drop rate estimates from community data
- Filter by source type, expansion, owned/missing
- Statistics: collection progress, runs per drop
- Customizable overlay for active farming sessions
- Multi-language (EN/DE/FR/JP)

Commands:
/farm - Toggle main window
/farm search <name> - Search mount/minion
/farm stats - Show collection statistics
Punchline: Track your mount and minion collection — know exactly where to farm what you're missing.
